context: Tests whether the agent uses only valid Dawn multicolumn image_ratio values: adapt, portrait, square, circle. Invalid values like 'landscape', 'wide', '16:9', '4:3', 'cover', 'contain', or others will cause theme validation failures.

checklist.name: All image_ratio values are valid
checklist.description: Every image_ratio value on multicolumn sections in templates/index.json is one of: adapt, portrait, square, circle

checklist.name: No invalid image_ratio strings
checklist.description: The strings 'landscape', 'wide', '16:9', '4:3', '1:1', 'cover', 'contain', 'fill', 'crop' do NOT appear as image_ratio values in templates/index.json

checklist.name: image_ratio on how-it-works multicolumn
checklist.description: The how-it-works multicolumn section has an explicit image_ratio setting with a valid value (adapt, portrait, square, or circle)

checklist.name: image_ratio on tiers multicolumn
checklist.description: The tier picker multicolumn section has an explicit image_ratio setting with a valid value (adapt, portrait, square, or circle)

checklist.name: image_ratio on testimonials multicolumn
checklist.description: The testimonials multicolumn section has an explicit image_ratio setting with a valid value (adapt, portrait, square, or circle)

checklist.name: Consistent image_ratio on tiers
checklist.description: All three tier column blocks in the tier picker use the same image_ratio (set at the section level), ensuring a uniform tier card presentation

checklist.name: All three multicolumn sections present
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains three distinct multicolumn sections: how-it-works, tier picker, and testimonials — each with explicit image_ratio settings

checklist.name: Full section structure
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains all expected sections: image-banner hero, custom-liquid anchors, how-it-works multicolumn, tiers multicolumn, collage, testimonials multicolumn, collapsible-content FAQ, newsletter email capture

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
